subcodes.first_line: O thou servant who gazeth upon the Countenance! We have indeed heard thy call and have become apprised of that which lieth within thy heart and breast. Render thou thanks [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا عبد الناظر الی الوجه قد سمعنا ندائک و اطلعنا بما فی قلبک و صدرک ان اشکر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @prayer for purity; chastity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision
